discoveries.how_to_collect: Walk near any tree — wood is collected automatically on proximity, no action needed
Walk near stone rocks — stones break and are collected automatically on proximity, no action needed

discoveries.how_to_use: Walk near the crafting machine while carrying the required resources — crafting triggers automatically

tool_recipes.how_to_craft: Collect wood by walking near trees, collect stone by walking near rocks, then walk to the crafting machine — it crafts automatically

area_knowledge.notes: Has trees for wood and rocks for stone. Crafting machine is present on the island.

resource_mechanics.collection_method: proximity-based — walk into/near the resource, it auto-collects
resource_mechanics.approach_direction: CRITICAL — always approach resources from the SOUTH side moving NORTH. Position yourself south of the tree/rock, then move NORTH into it. Collection triggers when entering from below.
resource_mechanics.crafting_method: proximity-based — walk to crafting machine with required items in inventory, crafts automatically
resource_mechanics.vegetation_clearing: CRITICAL — dense vegetation patches block movement. You cannot walk through uncleared vegetation. You must clear those tiles first before you can enter them. Route around uncleared vegetation or clear it with the appropriate tool before trying to pass through.

failed_strategies: Moving left and up from the starting position does not reach stones for collection.
wait_rule: Only use WAIT if you can visually confirm progress is happening — e.g. a resource counter is actively increasing, a crafting animation is playing, or an item is visibly being collected. If the screen shows no active change, WAIT is wasted time. Move instead.
value: Player moving north-west towards palm trees for wood collection
position_status: Player moving north-east to access stone for crafting scissors
